ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
